pokemon:weezing.name: Weezing
pokemon:weezing.summary: Weezing alternately shrinks and inflates its twin bodies to mix together toxic gases inside. The more the gases are mixed, the more powerful the toxins become. The Pokémon also becomes more putrid.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Weezing alternately shrinks and inflates its twin bodies to mix together toxic gases inside. The more the gases are mixed, the more powerful the toxins become. The Pokémon also becomes more putrid.
It grows by feeding on gases released by garbage. Though very rare, triplets have been found.
Inhaling toxic fumes from trash and mixing them inside its body lets it spread an even fouler stench.
Where two kinds of poison gases meet, 2 KOFFINGs can fuse into a WEEZING over many years.
When it inhales poisonous gases from garbage, its body expands, and its insides smell much worse.
It grows by feeding on gases released by garbage. Though very rare, triplets have been found.
By diluting its toxic gases with a special process, the highest grade of perfume can be extracted. To WEEZING, gases emanating from garbage are the ultimate feast.
Very rarely, a sudden mutation can result in two small KOFFING twins becoming conjoined as a WEEZING.
If one of the twin KOFFING inflates, the other one deflates. It con­ stantly mixes its poisonous gases.
If one of the twin KOFFING inflates, the other one deflates. It constantly mixes its poisonous gases.
Where two kinds of poison gases meet, two KOFFING can fuse into a WEEZING over many years.
This Pokémon lives and grows by absorbing poison gas, dust, and germs that exist inside garbage.
This Pokémon lives and grows by absorbing poison gas, dust, and germs that exist inside garbage.

Weezing loves the gases given off by rotted kitchen garbage. This Pokémon will find a dirty, unkempt house and make it its home. At night, when the people in the house are asleep, it will go through the trash.
It grows by feeding on gases released by garbage. Though very rare, triplets have been found.
It grows by feeding on gases released by garbage. Though very rare, triplets have been found.
Where two kinds of poison gases meet, 2 KOFFINGs can fuse into a WEEZING over many years.

WEEZING loves the gases given off by rotted kitchen garbage. This POKéMON will find a dirty, unkempt house and make it its home. At night, when the people in the house are asleep, it will go through the trash.
WEEZING alternately shrinks and inflates its twin bodies to mix together toxic gases inside. The more the gases are mixed, the more powerful the toxins become. The POKéMON also becomes more putrid.
It can’t suck in air quite as well as a Galarian Weezing, but the toxins it creates are more potent than those of its counterpart.
Top-grade perfume is made using its internal poison gases by diluting them to the high­ est level.
Top-grade perfume is made using its internal poison gases by diluting them to the highest level.
It mixes gases between its two bodies. It’s said that these Pokémon were seen all over the Galar region back in the day.
It grows by feeding on gases released by garbage. Though very rare, triplets have been found.
Inhaling toxic fumes from trash and mixing them inside its body lets it spread an even fouler stench.
If one of the twin Koffing inflates, the other one deflates. It constantly mixes its poisonous gases.
Very rarely, a sudden mutation can result in two small Koffing twins becoming conjoined as a Weezing.
It lives and grows by absorbing dust, germs and poison gases that are contained in toxic waste and garbage.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Weezing alternately shrinks and inflates its twin bodies to mix together toxic gases inside. The more the gases are mixed, the more powerful the toxins become. The Pokémon also becomes more putrid.

pokemon:koffing.name: Koffing
pokemon:koffing.summary: Koffing embodies toxic substances. It mixes the toxins with raw garbage to set off a chemical reaction that results in a terribly powerful poison gas. The higher the temperature, the more gas is concocted by this Pokémon.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Koffing embodies toxic substances. It mixes the toxins with raw garbage to set off a chemical reaction that results in a terribly powerful poison gas. The higher the temperature, the more gas is concocted by this Pokémon.
Lighter-than-air gases in its body keep it aloft. The gases not only smell, they are also explosive.
Toxic gas is held within its thin, balloon-shaped body, so it can cause massive explosions.
Because it stores several kinds of toxic gases in its body, it is prone to exploding without warning.
If one gets close enough to it when it expels poison­ ous gas, the gas swirling inside it can be seen.
Lighter-than-air gases in its body keep it aloft. The gases not only smell, they are also explosive.
Getting up close to a KOFFING will give you a chance to observe, through its thin skin, the toxic gases swirling inside. It blows up at the slightest stimulation.
Its thin, balloon-like body is inflated by horribly toxic gases. It reeks when it is nearby.
Its thin, filmy body is filled with gases that cause constant sniffles, coughs and teary eyes.
Its thin, filmy body is filled with gases that cause constant sniffles, coughs and teary eyes.
Because it stores several kinds of toxic gases in its body, it is prone to exploding without warning.
In hot places, its internal gases could expand and explode without any warning. Be very careful!
In hot places, its internal gases could expand and explode without any warning. Be very careful!
If Koffing becomes agitated, it raises the toxicity of its internal gases and jets them out from all over its body. This Pokémon may also overinflate its round body, then explode.
Lighter-than-air gases in its body keep it aloft. The gases not only smell, they are also explosive.
Lighter-than-air gases in its body keep it aloft. The gases not only smell, they are also explosive.
Because it stores several kinds of toxic gases in its body, it is prone to exploding without warning.
If KOFFING becomes agitated, it raises the toxicity of its internal gases and jets them out from all over its body. This POKéMON may also overinflate its round body, then explode.

KOFFING embodies toxic substances. It mixes the toxins with raw garbage to set off a chemical reaction that results in a terribly powerful poison gas. The higher the temperature, the more gas is concocted by this POKéMON.
It adores polluted air. Some claim that Koffing used to be more plentiful in the Galar region than they are now.
The poisonous gases it contains are a little bit lighter than air, keeping it slight­ ly airborne.
The poisonous gases it contains are a little bit lighter than air, keeping it slightly airborne.
Its body is full of poisonous gas. It floats into garbage dumps, seeking out the fumes of raw, rotting trash.
Lighter-than-air gases in its body keep it aloft. The gases not only smell, they are also explosive.
Toxic gas is held within its thin, balloon-shaped body, so it can cause massive explosions.
Its thin, balloon-like body is inflated by horribly toxic gases. It reeks when it is nearby.
Lighter-than-air gases in its body keep it aloft. The gases not only smell, they are also explosive.
In hot places, its internal gases could expand and explode without any warning. Be very careful!

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Koffing embodies toxic substances. It mixes the toxins with raw garbage to set off a chemical reaction that results in a terribly powerful poison gas. The higher the temperature, the more gas is concocted by this Pokémon.
